name: aie-miami-wiki
brandSubtitle: Public AI Engineer Miami 2026 transcript and research wiki.
primarySummary: Public AI Engineer Miami 2026 wiki inspired by Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern. The full Day 1 and Day 2 conference videos were released on YouTube without directly available transcripts, so their audio was downloaded and transcribed with Whisper. The resulting transcript files, public conference website, and labeled public-web sources were compiled into a read-only interlinked markdown wiki.
sourceBoundary: transcripts + conference website + clearly labeled public-web supporting context
